name: Skillsoft Corp.
description: Skillsoft Corp. is a leading educational technology company that provides an AI-native skills management platform designed to help enterprises build, apply, and prove human and AI skills. By unifying learning, real-time skills intelligence, and workforce insights, the company enables organizations to close skill gaps and drive performance at scale. Skillsoft offers a comprehensive suite of solutions, including the Percipio platform, instructor-led training, and coaching, to support the full learning lifecycle. Trusted by a significant portion of the Fortune 1000, Skillsoft empowers businesses to cultivate a future-ready workforce capable of navigating constant change in the modern era.
